expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves banding requirements, style constraints, and rendering assumptions before scenario drafting
expectations.evidence: The only substantive content provided is execution metadata and an aggregate grading summary. There is no phase output describing context intake, banding requirements, style constraints, rendering assumptions, or any scenario drafting. `result.md` only contains `./outputs/execution_notes.md`, and `execution_notes.md` contains only executor/duration/tokens/configuration.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: No phase1 deliverable content is present in the provided output files—only metadata and a summary JSON. Without any phase1 artifact (e.g., context intake output), alignment to phase1 cannot be evidenced.
